content: My earliest memory is my first day of school, in what we called nursery class, at Don Bosco High School in Chingmeirong, Imphal, Manipur. I was born in 1980, so this must have been around 1983 or 1984 — I was three or four. My aunt, who I call Echeme (her name is Meme Soraisham), used to drop me off. She's one of my closest aunts and always took real good care of me. I remember sitting in class, looking out the window, and telling my teacher I needed to pee. She was a kind lady named Miss Philomina, and she let me do it right out of the window, holding onto the grill. I also remember Echeme bringing me nice snacks during class time — she'd peek through the window looking for me so she could pass them through.
title: My earliest memory — first day of nursery school
